commands.review_summary:
The branch adds proxy circuit-breaker state with direct-fetch fallback for shared proxy fetch and old Discord monitor paths, lowers Discord gateway reconnect attempts, and tweaks rate-limit matchers.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence end-to-end reproduction of CPU exhaustion or retry-rate reduction is attached. Source inspection does show current main selects proxy dispatchers and propagates request-time proxy failures, so the unavailable-proxy path is source-reproducible but not behavior-proven.
commands.review_followup: Human networking/security product direction and contributor real behavior proof are required before merge; automation cannot decide fail-open proxy policy or supply the contributor's real setup evidence.

target.title: fix: add circuit breaker to proxy fetch to prevent CPU exhaustion
